nodes.label: Validate Environment
Load Routing References
nodes.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path
import polars as pl

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
    "pl": pl,
})

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
paths = validated.get("paths", {})

if not paths:
    raise ValueError("Missing Validate Environment result paths")

run_dir = Path(paths["run_dir"])
run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

nonbdo_matrix_path = Path(paths["nonbdo_matrix"])
bdo_matrix_path = Path(paths["bdo_matrix"])

BANK_MATRIX_COLUMNS = [
    {"bank": "rcbc", "col": "rcbc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "sbc", "col": "sbc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "gpap", "col": "gpap_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "pnb", "col": "pnb_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "aub", "col": "aub_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "ewb", "col": "ewb_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "mbc", "col": "mbc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "smac", "col": "smac_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "boc", "col": "boc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "maybank", "col": "maybank_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "ubp", "col": "ubp_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "maya", "col": "maya_straight mid", "extra_path": "straight"},
    {"bank": "maya", "col": "maya_debit mid", "extra_path": "debit"}
]

matrix_rows = []
pf_rows = []
matrix_columns = []
pf_columns = []
errors = []

try:
    matrix_df = pl.read_excel(nonbdo_matrix_path, engine="calamine", infer_schema_length=0)
    matrix_df.columns = [str(col).lower().strip() for col in matrix_df.columns]

    if "company code" in matrix_df.columns:
        matrix_df = matrix_df.with_columns(pl.col("company code").cast(pl.Utf8).str.strip_chars().str.zfill(3))
    if "branch code" in matrix_df.columns:
        matrix_df = matrix_df.with_columns(pl.col("branch code").cast(pl.Utf8).str.strip_chars().str.zfill(4))
    if "branch name" in matrix_df.columns:
        matrix_df = matrix_df.with_columns(pl.col("branch name").cast(pl.Utf8).str.strip_chars().str.to_lowercase())

    matrix_columns = matrix_df.columns

    matrix_rows = [
        {str(k): "" if v is None else str(v) for k, v in row.items()}
        for row in matrix_df.iter_rows(named=True)
    ]
except Exception as exc:
    errors.append({"source": "nonbdo_matrix", "error": str(exc)})

try:
    pf_df = pl.read_excel(bdo_matrix_path, engine="calamine", infer_schema_length=0)
    pf_df.columns = [str(col).lower().strip() for col in pf_df.columns]

    pf_columns = pf_df.columns
    pf_rows = [
        {str(k): "" if v is None else str(v) for k, v in row.items()}
        for row in pf_df.iter_rows(named=True)
    ]
except Exception as exc:
    errors.append({"source": "bdo_matrix", "error": str(exc)})

refs_payload = {
    "bank_matrix_columns": BANK_MATRIX_COLUMNS,
    "matrix_rows": matrix_rows,
    "matrix_columns": matrix_columns,
    "pf_rows": pf_rows,
    "pf_columns": pf_columns,
}

refs_file = run_dir / "routing_references.json"
refs_file.write_text(json.dumps(refs_payload, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

log(f"Loaded references: NonBDO={len(matrix_rows)}, BDO={len(pf_rows)}", level="info")

result = {
    "status": "loaded",
    "refs_file": str(refs_file),
    "nonbdo_rows": len(matrix_rows),
    "bdo_rows": len(pf_rows),
    "matrix_columns": matrix_columns[:30],
    "pf_columns": pf_columns[:30],
    "errors": errors[:10],
}

nodes.label: Scan Candidate Files
Extract File Signals
Apply Routing Rules
Build Destination Paths
nodes.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
})

def join_destination_path(*parts):
    return "/".join(
        str(part).strip("/")
        for part in parts
        if part is not None and str(part).strip("/") != ""
    )

routing = context.get("Apply Routing Rules", {}).get("result")
if not routing:
    raise ValueError("Missing Apply Routing Rules result")

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
run_dir = Path(validated["paths"]["run_dir"])

routed_files = json.loads(Path(routing["routed_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

sandbox_prefix = config.get("sandbox_prefix", "bronze-testing")
bucket_name = config.get("bucket_name", "sm-bronze")
dry_run = bool(config.get("dry_run", True))

file_results = []
error_files = []

for item in routed_files:
    stop_if_requested()

    try:
        file_name = item["file_name"]
        route_family = item.get("route_family", "bank")
        bank = item.get("bank", "unknown_bank")
        company = item.get("company", "000")
        branch = item.get("branch", "0000")
        year = item.get("year", "2026")
        month = item.get("month", "05")
        day = item.get("day", "15")
        extra_path = item.get("extra_path", "")

        if route_family == "pos":
            pos_meta = item.get("pos_meta") or {}
            family = str(pos_meta.get("family", "")).lower()
            pos_subfolder = "datacapture" if family == "tl" else "z_reading"

            gcs_destination = join_destination_path(
                sandbox_prefix,
                "pos",
                "visual_store",
                pos_subfolder,
                f"company={company}",
                f"branch={branch}",
                f"year={year}",
                f"month={month}",
                f"day={day}",
                file_name,
            )

        else:
            if extra_path:
                gcs_destination = join_destination_path(
                    sandbox_prefix,
                    "bank",
                    "paymentfiles",
                    bank,
                    extra_path,
                    f"company={company}",
                    f"branch={branch}",
                    f"year={year}",
                    f"month={month}",
                    f"day={day}",
                    file_name,
                )
            else:
                gcs_destination = join_destination_path(
                    sandbox_prefix,
                    "bank",
                    "paymentfiles",
                    bank,
                    f"company={company}",
                    f"branch={branch}",
                    f"year={year}",
                    f"month={month}",
                    f"day={day}",
                    file_name,
                )

        gcs_uri = f"gs://{bucket_name}/{gcs_destination}"

        file_results.append({
            **item,
            "gcs_destination": gcs_destination,
            "destination_path": gcs_destination,
            "dry_run_gcs_uri": gcs_uri,
            "dry_run_cloud_uri": gcs_uri,
        })

    except Exception as exc:
        error_files.append({
            "file_path": item.get("file_path"),
            "file_name": item.get("file_name"),
            "error": str(exc),
        })

file_results_file = run_dir / "file_results.json"
destination_errors_file = run_dir / "destination_errors.json"

file_results_file.write_text(json.dumps(file_results, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
destination_errors_file.write_text(json.dumps(error_files, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

log(f"Destination paths built: {len(file_results)}, errors={len(error_files)}", level="info")

result = {
    "status": "destination_ready",
    "file_results_file": str(file_results_file),
    "destination_errors_file": str(destination_errors_file),
    "bucket_name": bucket_name,
    "sandbox_prefix": sandbox_prefix,
    "dry_run": dry_run,
    "total_files": len(file_results),
    "total_errors": len(error_files),
    "sample_destinations": file_results[:10],
    "sample_errors": error_files[:10],
}

nodes.label: Process & Match Files
nodes.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
})

scan = context.get("Scan Candidate Files", {}).get("result")
extraction = context.get("Extract File Signals", {}).get("result")
routing = context.get("Apply Routing Rules", {}).get("result")
destination = (context.get("Build Destination Paths", {}) or context.get("Build GCS Destination", {})).get("result")

if not scan:
    raise ValueError("Missing Scan Candidate Files result")
if not extraction:
    raise ValueError("Missing Extract File Signals result")
if not routing:
    raise ValueError("Missing Apply Routing Rules result")
if not destination:
    raise ValueError("Missing Build Destination Paths result")

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
run_dir = Path(validated["paths"]["run_dir"])

file_results = json.loads(Path(destination["file_results_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

skipped_files = []
if scan.get("skipped_file"):
    skipped_files = json.loads(Path(scan["skipped_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in skipped_files:
        item.setdefault("stage", "scan")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Skipped by scanner rules")

extraction_errors = []
if extraction.get("signal_errors_file"):
    extraction_errors = json.loads(Path(extraction["signal_errors_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in extraction_errors:
        item.setdefault("stage", "extract")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Extraction failed")
        item.setdefault("extension", Path(item.get("file_name", "")).suffix.lower() or "no extension")

routing_errors = []
if routing.get("routing_errors_file"):
    routing_errors = json.loads(Path(routing["routing_errors_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in routing_errors:
        item.setdefault("stage", "routing")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Routing failed")

unmatched_files = []
if routing.get("unmatched_file"):
    unmatched_files = json.loads(Path(routing["unmatched_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

if unmatched_files:
    log(f"Files routed as unknown_bank: {len(unmatched_files)}", level="warning")

destination_errors = []
destination_errors_file = destination.get("destination_errors_file") or destination.get("gcs_errors_file")
if destination_errors_file:
    destination_errors = json.loads(Path(destination_errors_file).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in destination_errors:
        item.setdefault("stage", "destination_path")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Destination path build failed")

error_files = extraction_errors + routing_errors + destination_errors
not_processed_files = skipped_files + error_files


def group_examples_by_extension(items):
    groups = {}
    for item in items:
        extension = str(item.get("extension") or Path(item.get("file_name", "")).suffix or "no extension").lower()
        reason = str(item.get("reason") or item.get("error") or item.get("match_source") or "processed")
        stage = str(item.get("stage") or "processing")
        key = f"{stage}|{extension}|{reason}"
        if key not in groups:
            groups[key] = {
                "stage": stage,
                "extension": extension,
                "count": 0,
                "example": item.get("file_name"),
                "reason": reason,
                "error": item.get("error"),
                "bank": item.get("bank"),
                "matched_reference_id": item.get("matched_reference_id"),
            }
        groups[key]["count"] += 1
    return list(groups.values())

bank_counts = {}
bank_examples = {}
for item in file_results:
    bank = item.get("bank", "unknown_bank")
    bank_counts[bank] = bank_counts.get(bank, 0) + 1
    if bank not in bank_examples:
        bank_examples[bank] = {
            "file_name": item.get("file_name"),
            "extension": item.get("extension"),
            "matched_reference_id": item.get("matched_reference_id"),
            "company": item.get("company"),
            "branch": item.get("branch"),
            "destination_blob": item.get("destination_blob"),
        }

manifest_file = run_dir / "final_manifest.json"
manifest_payload = {
    "file_results": file_results,
    "skipped_files": skipped_files,
    "extraction_errors": extraction_errors,
    "routing_errors": routing_errors,
    "destination_errors": destination_errors,
    "error_files": error_files,
    "not_processed_files": not_processed_files,
    "unmatched_files": unmatched_files,
    "bank_counts": bank_counts,
    "bank_examples": bank_examples,
}

manifest_file.write_text(json.dumps(manifest_payload, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

if extraction_errors:
    log(f"Files not processed during extraction: {len(extraction_errors)}", level="warning")
    for item in extraction_errors[:3]:
        log(f"Extraction issue: {item.get('file_name')} - {item.get('error')}", level="warning")
if routing_errors:
    log(f"Files failed during routing: {len(routing_errors)}", level="warning")
if destination_errors:
    log(f"Files failed while building destination paths: {len(destination_errors)}", level="warning")

result = {
    "status": "processed_with_issues" if not_processed_files else "processed",
    "manifest_file": str(manifest_file),
    "file_results_file": destination["file_results_file"],
    "bucket_name": destination.get("bucket_name"),
    "sandbox_prefix": destination.get("sandbox_prefix"),
    "dry_run": destination.get("dry_run", True),
    "total_scanned": scan.get("total_scanned", 0),
    "total_candidates": scan.get("total_candidates", 0),
    "total_extracted": extraction.get("total_signals", len(file_results)),
    "total_routed": len(file_results),
    "total_skipped": len(skipped_files),
    "total_extraction_errors": len(extraction_errors),
    "total_routing_errors": len(routing_errors),
    "total_destination_errors": len(destination_errors),
    "total_gcs_errors": len(destination_errors),
    "total_errors": len(error_files),
    "total_not_processed": len(not_processed_files),
    "bank_counts": bank_counts,
    "bank_examples": bank_examples,
    "sample_file_results": group_examples_by_extension(file_results),
    "sample_skipped": group_examples_by_extension(skipped_files),
    "sample_extraction_errors": group_examples_by_extension(extraction_errors),
    "sample_errors": group_examples_by_extension(error_files),
    "sample_not_processed": group_examples_by_extension(not_processed_files),
    "file_result_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(file_results),
    "skipped_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(skipped_files),
    "extraction_error_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(extraction_errors),
    "not_processed_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(not_processed_files),
    "total_unmatched": len(unmatched_files),
    "sample_unmatched": group_examples_by_extension(unmatched_files),
    "unmatched_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(unmatched_files),
}

nodes.label: Deliver Files
nodes.script:
import json
import shutil
import time
from pathlib import Path
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed
from google.cloud import storage


globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "shutil": shutil,
    "time": time,
    "Path": Path,
    "ThreadPoolExecutor": ThreadPoolExecutor,
    "as_completed": as_completed,
    "storage": storage,
})

processed = context.get("Process & Match Files", {}).get("result")
if not processed:
    raise ValueError("Missing Process & Match Files result")

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
paths = validated.get("paths", {})
run_dir = Path(paths.get("run_dir") or Path(processed["file_results_file"]).parent)
credentials_file = Path(paths["credentials_file"]) if paths.get("credentials_file") else None

file_results = json.loads(Path(processed["file_results_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

upload_target = "local" if str(config.get("upload_target", "gcs")).lower() == "local" else "gcs"
bucket_name = config.get("bucket_name") or processed.get("bucket_name") or "sm-bronze"
dry_run = bool(config.get("dry_run", processed.get("dry_run", True)))
upload_workers = max(1, min(int(config.get("upload_workers", 8)), 32))
local_output_dir = str(config.get("local_output_dir") or "").strip()
local_overwrite = bool(config.get("local_overwrite", False))

if upload_target == "local" and not local_output_dir:
    raise ValueError("Local output folder is required when Upload Target is Local Drive")

uploaded_files = []
planned_files = []
error_files = []

if upload_target == "gcs" and not dry_run:
    if not credentials_file:
        raise ValueError("Credentials File is required when delivery target is Cloud Storage")
    storage_client = storage.Client.from_service_account_json(str(credentials_file))
    bucket = storage_client.bucket(bucket_name)
else:
    bucket = None


def safe_relative_destination(destination, Path_arg=Path):
    parts = []
    for raw_part in str(destination or "").replace("\\", "/").split("/"):
        part = raw_part.strip()
        if not part or part in {".", ".."}:
            continue
        part = part.replace(":", "_")
        parts.append(part)
    if not parts:
        raise ValueError("Missing destination path")
    return Path_arg(*parts)


def resolve_local_output_root(raw_path, Path_arg=Path):
    path = Path_arg(str(raw_path or "")).expanduser()
    if path.is_absolute():
        return path
    first_part = path.parts[0].lower() if path.parts else ""
    if first_part in {"downloads", "documents", "desktop"}:
        return Path_arg.home() / path
    return path.resolve()


def build_delivery_payload(
    item,
    bucket_name_arg=bucket_name,
    upload_target_arg=upload_target,
    local_output_dir_arg=local_output_dir,
    Path_arg=Path,
    safe_relative_destination_fn=safe_relative_destination,
    resolve_local_output_root_fn=resolve_local_output_root,
):
    local_path = item.get("file_path")
    gcs_destination = item.get("gcs_destination")
    content_type = item.get("content_type", "application/octet-stream")

    if not local_path or not gcs_destination:
        return None, {
            "file_path": local_path,
            "gcs_destination": gcs_destination,
            "error": "Missing file_path or gcs_destination",
        }

    payload = {
        "file_path": local_path,
        "gcs_destination": gcs_destination,
        "destination_path": gcs_destination,
        "content_type": content_type,
        "gcs_uri": f"gs://{bucket_name_arg}/{gcs_destination}",
        "cloud_uri": f"gs://{bucket_name_arg}/{gcs_destination}",
    }
    if upload_target_arg == "local":
        local_root = resolve_local_output_root_fn(local_output_dir_arg)
        local_destination = local_root / safe_relative_destination_fn(gcs_destination)
        payload["local_destination"] = str(local_destination)
    return payload, None


def deliver_one(
    payload,
    bucket_arg=bucket,
    upload_target_arg=upload_target,
    local_overwrite_arg=local_overwrite,
    stop_if_requested_fn=stop_if_requested,
    Path_arg=Path,
    shutil_arg=shutil,
):
    stop_if_requested_fn()
    try:
        if upload_target_arg == "local":
            destination = Path_arg(payload["local_destination"])
            if destination.exists() and not local_overwrite_arg:
                return None, {
                    "file_path": payload["file_path"],
                    "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
                    "local_destination": str(destination),
                    "error": "Local destination already exists and overwrite is off",
                }
            destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            shutil_arg.copy2(str(payload["file_path"]), str(destination))
            return {
                "file_path": payload["file_path"],
                "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
                "destination_path": payload["gcs_destination"],
                "local_destination": str(destination),
            }, None

        blob = bucket_arg.blob(payload["gcs_destination"])
        blob.upload_from_filename(str(payload["file_path"]), content_type=payload["content_type"])
        return {
            "file_path": payload["file_path"],
            "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
            "gcs_uri": payload["gcs_uri"],
            "cloud_uri": payload["gcs_uri"],
            "destination_path": payload["gcs_destination"],
        }, None
    except Exception as exc:
        return None, {
            "file_path": payload["file_path"],
            "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
            "local_destination": payload.get("local_destination"),
            "error": str(exc),
        }


delivery_payloads = []
for item in file_results:
    stop_if_requested()
    payload, error = build_delivery_payload(item)
    if error:
        error_files.append(error)
        continue

    if dry_run:
        planned = {
            "file_path": payload["file_path"],
            "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
            "gcs_uri": payload["gcs_uri"],
        }
        if upload_target == "local":
            planned["local_destination"] = payload["local_destination"]
        planned_files.append(planned)
    else:
        delivery_payloads.append(payload)

if delivery_payloads:
    total_deliveries = len(delivery_payloads)
    progress_interval = max(1, min(100, total_deliveries // 10 or 1))
    delivery_started_at = time.monotonic()
    target_label = f"local folder {local_output_dir}" if upload_target == "local" else f"GCS bucket {bucket_name}"
    log(f"Delivering {total_deliveries} files to {target_label} with {upload_workers} workers", level="info")
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=upload_workers) as executor:
        futures = [executor.submit(deliver_one, payload) for payload in delivery_payloads]
        for completed_count, future in enumerate(as_completed(futures), start=1):
            stop_if_requested()
            delivered, error = future.result()
            if delivered:
                uploaded_files.append(delivered)
            if error:
                error_files.append(error)
            if completed_count == total_deliveries or completed_count % progress_interval == 0:
                elapsed = time.monotonic() - delivery_started_at
                rate = completed_count / elapsed if elapsed > 0 else completed_count
                log(
                    f"Delivery progress: {completed_count}/{total_deliveries} done, "
                    f"delivered={len(uploaded_files)}, errors={len(error_files)}, rate={rate:.1f}/sec",
                    level="info",
                )

def delivery_key(item):
    if not isinstance(item, dict):
        return ""
    return str(item.get("local_destination") or item.get("gcs_destination") or item.get("destination_path") or "")


def unique_by_delivery_destination(items, delivery_key_fn=delivery_key):
    seen = set()
    unique_items = []
    for item in items:
        key = delivery_key_fn(item)
        if not key or key in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(key)
        unique_items.append(item)
    return unique_items

def duplicate_delivery_examples(items, delivery_key_fn=delivery_key):
    groups = {}
    for item in items:
        key = delivery_key_fn(item)
        if not key:
            continue
        if key not in groups:
            groups[key] = {
                "count": 0,
                "destination_path": item.get("gcs_destination") or item.get("destination_path"),
                "local_destination": item.get("local_destination"),
                "example": item.get("file_path"),
            }
        groups[key]["count"] += 1
    return [item for item in groups.values() if item["count"] > 1]


unique_delivered_files = unique_by_delivery_destination(uploaded_files)
duplicate_delivery_files = duplicate_delivery_examples(uploaded_files)
duplicate_delivery_count = max(0, len(uploaded_files) - len(unique_delivered_files))
delivered_manifest_file = run_dir / "delivered_files.json"
delivered_manifest_file.write_text(json.dumps(unique_delivered_files, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

if dry_run:
    status = "dry_run"
elif error_files and not uploaded_files:
    status = "delivery_failed"
elif error_files:
    status = "completed_with_delivery_errors"
else:
    status = "copied_local" if upload_target == "local" else "uploaded"
log(
    f"Delivery node finished: target={upload_target}, dry_run={dry_run}, planned={len(planned_files)}, delivered={len(unique_delivered_files)}, duplicate_attempts={duplicate_delivery_count}, errors={len(error_files)}",
    level="info",
)

result = {
    "status": status,
    "upload_target": upload_target,
    "dry_run": dry_run,
    "bucket_name": bucket_name,
    "local_output_dir": str(resolve_local_output_root(local_output_dir)) if upload_target == "local" else local_output_dir,
    "local_overwrite": local_overwrite,
    "upload_workers": upload_workers,
    "input_count": len(file_results),
    "planned_count": len(planned_files),
    "uploaded_count": len(unique_delivered_files),
    "delivered_count": len(unique_delivered_files),
    "delivery_attempt_count": len(uploaded_files),
    "duplicate_delivery_count": duplicate_delivery_count,
    "sample_duplicate_delivery_files": duplicate_delivery_files[:10],
    "delivered_manifest_file": str(delivered_manifest_file),
    "error_count": len(error_files),
    "sample_planned_files": planned_files[:10],
    "sample_uploaded_files": unique_delivered_files[:10],
    "sample_delivered_files": unique_delivered_files[:10],
    "sample_error_files": error_files[:10],
}

nodes.label: Final Summary
nodes.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
})

processed = context.get("Process & Match Files", {}).get("result")
delivery = (context.get("Deliver Files", {}) or context.get("Upload to GCS", {})).get("result")

if not processed:
    raise ValueError("Missing Process & Match Files result")
if not delivery:
    raise ValueError("Missing Deliver Files result")

bank_counts = processed.get("bank_counts", {})


def delivery_destination_key(item):
    if not isinstance(item, dict):
        return ""
    return str(item.get("local_destination") or item.get("gcs_destination") or item.get("destination_path") or "")


def normalize_destination_key(value):
    return str(value or "").replace("\\", "/").strip().lower()


file_results = []
if processed.get("file_results_file"):
    try:
        file_results = json.loads(Path(processed["file_results_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception as exc:
        log(f"Could not load file results for delivered bank counts: {exc}", level="warning")

bank_by_destination = {}
for item in file_results:
    destination_key = normalize_destination_key(
        item.get("gcs_destination") or item.get("destination_path") or item.get("destination_blob")
    )
    if destination_key:
        bank_by_destination[destination_key] = item.get("bank") or "unknown_bank"

delivered_files = []
if delivery.get("delivered_manifest_file"):
    try:
        delivered_files = json.loads(Path(delivery["delivered_manifest_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception as exc:
        log(f"Could not load delivered manifest for delivered bank counts: {exc}", level="warning")
if not delivered_files:
    delivered_files = delivery.get("sample_delivered_files") or delivery.get("sample_uploaded_files") or []

delivered_bank_counts = {}
for item in delivered_files:
    destination_key = normalize_destination_key(item.get("gcs_destination") or item.get("destination_path"))
    bank = bank_by_destination.get(destination_key) or item.get("bank") or "unknown_bank"
    delivered_bank_counts[bank] = delivered_bank_counts.get(bank, 0) + 1

source_bank_counts = bank_counts
bank_counts = delivered_bank_counts or source_bank_counts

bdo_count = bank_counts.get("bdo", 0)
pos_count = bank_counts.get("pos", 0)
unknown_count = bank_counts.get("unknown_bank", 0)

nonbdo_count = 0
for bank_name, count in bank_counts.items():
    if bank_name not in ["bdo", "pos", "unknown_bank"]:
        nonbdo_count += count

issue_count = processed.get("total_not_processed", 0)
extraction_error_count = processed.get("total_extraction_errors", 0)
routing_error_count = processed.get("total_routing_errors", 0)
delivery_error_count = processed.get("total_destination_errors", processed.get("total_gcs_errors", 0))
unknown_file_count = processed.get("total_unmatched", 0)
duplicate_delivery_count = delivery.get("duplicate_delivery_count", 0)
duplicate_delivery_samples = delivery.get("sample_duplicate_delivery_files", [])
delivery_note = ""
if duplicate_delivery_count:
    delivery_note = (
        f"{duplicate_delivery_count} routed file(s) were not delivered separately because they shared "
        "a destination path with another delivered file. Review sample_duplicate_delivery_files to see where they went."
    )

log("FINAL SUMMARY", level="info")
log(f"Scanned={processed.get('total_scanned', 0)}, Candidates={processed.get('total_candidates', 0)}, Extracted={processed.get('total_extracted', 0)}, Routed={processed.get('total_routed', 0)}", level="info")
log(f"Skipped={processed.get('total_skipped', 0)}, Not processed={issue_count}, Errors={processed.get('total_errors', 0)}", level="info")
log(f"Delivered by bank: BDO={bdo_count}, NonBDO={nonbdo_count}, POS={pos_count}, Unknown={unknown_count}", level="info")
log(f"Delivery status={delivery.get('status')}, Target={delivery.get('upload_target', 'cloud')}, Dry run={delivery.get('dry_run')}", level="info")

if issue_count:
    log(
        f"Processing issues found: extraction_errors={extraction_error_count}, routing_errors={routing_error_count}, delivery_errors={delivery_error_count}",
        level="warning",
    )
    for item in processed.get("sample_not_processed", [])[:5]:
        log(
            f"Not processed: {item.get('extension')} ({item.get('count')} file(s)) - {item.get('reason')}. Example: {item.get('example')}",
            level="warning",
        )

if unknown_file_count:
    log(f"Files routed to unknown_bank: {unknown_file_count}. Review unmatched examples in Run Logs.", level="warning")

if duplicate_delivery_count:
    log(delivery_note, level="warning")
    for item in duplicate_delivery_samples[:5]:
        destination = item.get("local_destination") or item.get("destination_path") or "Unknown destination"
        example = item.get("example") or "Unknown file"
        log(
            f"Duplicate delivery destination: {item.get('count', 0)} routed file(s), delivered location={destination}, example duplicate={example}",
            level="warning",
        )

result = {
    "status": "completed_with_issues" if issue_count or delivery.get("error_count", 0) or duplicate_delivery_count else "completed",
    "dry_run": delivery.get("dry_run", True),
    "delivery_target": delivery.get("upload_target", "gcs"),
    "delivery_status": delivery.get("status"),
    "total_scanned": processed.get("total_scanned", 0),
    "total_candidates": processed.get("total_candidates", 0),
    "total_extracted": processed.get("total_extracted", 0),
    "total_routed": processed.get("total_routed", 0),
    "total_skipped": processed.get("total_skipped", 0),
    "total_not_processed": issue_count,
    "processing_error_count": processed.get("total_errors", 0),
    "extraction_error_count": extraction_error_count,
    "routing_error_count": routing_error_count,
    "path_error_count": delivery_error_count,
    "unknown_count": unknown_count,
    "unmatched_count": unknown_file_count,
    "bank_counts": bank_counts,
    "source_bank_counts": source_bank_counts,
    "delivered_bank_counts": delivered_bank_counts,
    "bdo_count": bdo_count,
    "nonbdo_count": nonbdo_count,
    "pos_count": pos_count,
    "planned_delivery_count": delivery.get("planned_count", 0),
    "delivery_attempt_count": delivery.get("delivery_attempt_count", delivery.get("delivered_count", delivery.get("uploaded_count", 0))),
    "delivered_count": delivery.get("delivered_count", delivery.get("uploaded_count", 0)),
    "duplicate_delivery_count": duplicate_delivery_count,
    "delivery_note": delivery_note,
    "sample_duplicate_delivery_files": duplicate_delivery_samples,
    "delivery_error_count": delivery.get("error_count", 0),
    "manifest_file": processed.get("manifest_file"),
    "file_results_file": processed.get("file_results_file"),
    "sample_file_results": processed.get("sample_file_results", []),
    "sample_skipped": processed.get("sample_skipped", []),
    "sample_extraction_errors": processed.get("sample_extraction_errors", []),
    "sample_not_processed": processed.get("sample_not_processed", []),
    "sample_errors": processed.get("sample_errors", []),
    "sample_unmatched": processed.get("sample_unmatched", []),
    "sample_delivery_errors": delivery.get("sample_error_files", []),
}

settings.notes: Add scripts to start building the flow.

script_library.label: Validate Environment
script_library.script:
from pathlib import Path

source_type = config.get("source_type", "workspace")
source_dir = resolve_input_path(config["source_dir"], source_type)
nonbdo_matrix = resolve_input_path(config["nonbdo_matrix"], source_type)
bdo_matrix = resolve_input_path(config["bdo_matrix"], source_type)
credentials_file = resolve_input_path(config["credentials_file"], source_type)

required_paths = {
    "source_dir": source_dir,
    "nonbdo_matrix": nonbdo_matrix,
    "bdo_matrix": bdo_matrix,
    "credentials_file": credentials_file,
}

for name, path in required_paths.items():
    if not Path(path).exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"{name} does not exist: {path}")

run_dir = Path(workspace_dir) / config.get("run_dir", ".workflow_runs/raw_router")
run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

result = {
    "status": "validated",
    "paths": {
        "source_dir": str(source_dir),
        "nonbdo_matrix": str(nonbdo_matrix),
        "bdo_matrix": str(bdo_matrix),
        "credentials_file": str(credentials_file),
        "run_dir": str(run_dir),
    }
}

script_library.label: Load Routing References
script_library.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path
import polars as pl

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
    "pl": pl,
})

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
paths = validated.get("paths", {})

if not paths:
    raise ValueError("Missing Validate Environment result paths")

run_dir = Path(paths["run_dir"])
run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

nonbdo_matrix_path = Path(paths["nonbdo_matrix"])
bdo_matrix_path = Path(paths["bdo_matrix"])

BANK_MATRIX_COLUMNS = [
    {"bank": "rcbc", "col": "rcbc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "sbc", "col": "sbc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "gpap", "col": "gpap_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "pnb", "col": "pnb_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "aub", "col": "aub_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "ewb", "col": "ewb_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "mbc", "col": "mbc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "smac", "col": "smac_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "boc", "col": "boc_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "maybank", "col": "maybank_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "ubp", "col": "ubp_branch mid", "extra_path": ""},
    {"bank": "maya", "col": "maya_straight mid", "extra_path": "straight"},
    {"bank": "maya", "col": "maya_debit mid", "extra_path": "debit"}
]

matrix_rows = []
pf_rows = []
matrix_columns = []
pf_columns = []
errors = []

try:
    matrix_df = pl.read_excel(nonbdo_matrix_path, engine="calamine", infer_schema_length=0)
    matrix_df.columns = [str(col).lower().strip() for col in matrix_df.columns]

    if "company code" in matrix_df.columns:
        matrix_df = matrix_df.with_columns(pl.col("company code").cast(pl.Utf8).str.strip_chars().str.zfill(3))
    if "branch code" in matrix_df.columns:
        matrix_df = matrix_df.with_columns(pl.col("branch code").cast(pl.Utf8).str.strip_chars().str.zfill(4))
    if "branch name" in matrix_df.columns:
        matrix_df = matrix_df.with_columns(pl.col("branch name").cast(pl.Utf8).str.strip_chars().str.to_lowercase())

    matrix_columns = matrix_df.columns

    matrix_rows = [
        {str(k): "" if v is None else str(v) for k, v in row.items()}
        for row in matrix_df.iter_rows(named=True)
    ]
except Exception as exc:
    errors.append({"source": "nonbdo_matrix", "error": str(exc)})

try:
    pf_df = pl.read_excel(bdo_matrix_path, engine="calamine", infer_schema_length=0)
    pf_df.columns = [str(col).lower().strip() for col in pf_df.columns]

    pf_columns = pf_df.columns
    pf_rows = [
        {str(k): "" if v is None else str(v) for k, v in row.items()}
        for row in pf_df.iter_rows(named=True)
    ]
except Exception as exc:
    errors.append({"source": "bdo_matrix", "error": str(exc)})

refs_payload = {
    "bank_matrix_columns": BANK_MATRIX_COLUMNS,
    "matrix_rows": matrix_rows,
    "matrix_columns": matrix_columns,
    "pf_rows": pf_rows,
    "pf_columns": pf_columns,
}

refs_file = run_dir / "routing_references.json"
refs_file.write_text(json.dumps(refs_payload, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

log(f"Loaded references: NonBDO={len(matrix_rows)}, BDO={len(pf_rows)}", level="info")

result = {
    "status": "loaded",
    "refs_file": str(refs_file),
    "nonbdo_rows": len(matrix_rows),
    "bdo_rows": len(pf_rows),
    "matrix_columns": matrix_columns[:30],
    "pf_columns": pf_columns[:30],
    "errors": errors[:10],
}

script_library.label: Scan Candidate Files
Extract File Signals
Apply Routing Rules
Build Destination Paths
script_library.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
})

def join_destination_path(*parts):
    return "/".join(
        str(part).strip("/")
        for part in parts
        if part is not None and str(part).strip("/") != ""
    )

routing = context.get("Apply Routing Rules", {}).get("result")
if not routing:
    raise ValueError("Missing Apply Routing Rules result")

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
run_dir = Path(validated["paths"]["run_dir"])

routed_files = json.loads(Path(routing["routed_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

sandbox_prefix = config.get("sandbox_prefix", "bronze-testing")
bucket_name = config.get("bucket_name", "sm-bronze")
dry_run = bool(config.get("dry_run", True))

file_results = []
error_files = []

for item in routed_files:
    stop_if_requested()

    try:
        file_name = item["file_name"]
        route_family = item.get("route_family", "bank")
        bank = item.get("bank", "unknown_bank")
        company = item.get("company", "000")
        branch = item.get("branch", "0000")
        year = item.get("year", "2026")
        month = item.get("month", "05")
        day = item.get("day", "15")
        extra_path = item.get("extra_path", "")

        if route_family == "pos":
            pos_meta = item.get("pos_meta") or {}
            family = str(pos_meta.get("family", "")).lower()
            pos_subfolder = "datacapture" if family == "tl" else "z_reading"

            gcs_destination = join_destination_path(
                sandbox_prefix,
                "pos",
                "visual_store",
                pos_subfolder,
                f"company={company}",
                f"branch={branch}",
                f"year={year}",
                f"month={month}",
                f"day={day}",
                file_name,
            )

        else:
            if extra_path:
                gcs_destination = join_destination_path(
                    sandbox_prefix,
                    "bank",
                    "paymentfiles",
                    bank,
                    extra_path,
                    f"company={company}",
                    f"branch={branch}",
                    f"year={year}",
                    f"month={month}",
                    f"day={day}",
                    file_name,
                )
            else:
                gcs_destination = join_destination_path(
                    sandbox_prefix,
                    "bank",
                    "paymentfiles",
                    bank,
                    f"company={company}",
                    f"branch={branch}",
                    f"year={year}",
                    f"month={month}",
                    f"day={day}",
                    file_name,
                )

        gcs_uri = f"gs://{bucket_name}/{gcs_destination}"

        file_results.append({
            **item,
            "gcs_destination": gcs_destination,
            "destination_path": gcs_destination,
            "dry_run_gcs_uri": gcs_uri,
            "dry_run_cloud_uri": gcs_uri,
        })

    except Exception as exc:
        error_files.append({
            "file_path": item.get("file_path"),
            "file_name": item.get("file_name"),
            "error": str(exc),
        })

file_results_file = run_dir / "file_results.json"
destination_errors_file = run_dir / "destination_errors.json"

file_results_file.write_text(json.dumps(file_results, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
destination_errors_file.write_text(json.dumps(error_files, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

log(f"Destination paths built: {len(file_results)}, errors={len(error_files)}", level="info")

result = {
    "status": "destination_ready",
    "file_results_file": str(file_results_file),
    "destination_errors_file": str(destination_errors_file),
    "bucket_name": bucket_name,
    "sandbox_prefix": sandbox_prefix,
    "dry_run": dry_run,
    "total_files": len(file_results),
    "total_errors": len(error_files),
    "sample_destinations": file_results[:10],
    "sample_errors": error_files[:10],
}

script_library.label: Process & Match Files
script_library.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
})

scan = context.get("Scan Candidate Files", {}).get("result")
extraction = context.get("Extract File Signals", {}).get("result")
routing = context.get("Apply Routing Rules", {}).get("result")
destination = (context.get("Build Destination Paths", {}) or context.get("Build GCS Destination", {})).get("result")

if not scan:
    raise ValueError("Missing Scan Candidate Files result")
if not extraction:
    raise ValueError("Missing Extract File Signals result")
if not routing:
    raise ValueError("Missing Apply Routing Rules result")
if not destination:
    raise ValueError("Missing Build Destination Paths result")

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
run_dir = Path(validated["paths"]["run_dir"])

file_results = json.loads(Path(destination["file_results_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

skipped_files = []
if scan.get("skipped_file"):
    skipped_files = json.loads(Path(scan["skipped_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in skipped_files:
        item.setdefault("stage", "scan")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Skipped by scanner rules")

extraction_errors = []
if extraction.get("signal_errors_file"):
    extraction_errors = json.loads(Path(extraction["signal_errors_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in extraction_errors:
        item.setdefault("stage", "extract")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Extraction failed")
        item.setdefault("extension", Path(item.get("file_name", "")).suffix.lower() or "no extension")

routing_errors = []
if routing.get("routing_errors_file"):
    routing_errors = json.loads(Path(routing["routing_errors_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in routing_errors:
        item.setdefault("stage", "routing")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Routing failed")

unmatched_files = []
if routing.get("unmatched_file"):
    unmatched_files = json.loads(Path(routing["unmatched_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

if unmatched_files:
    log(f"Files routed as unknown_bank: {len(unmatched_files)}", level="warning")

destination_errors = []
destination_errors_file = destination.get("destination_errors_file") or destination.get("gcs_errors_file")
if destination_errors_file:
    destination_errors = json.loads(Path(destination_errors_file).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for item in destination_errors:
        item.setdefault("stage", "destination_path")
        item.setdefault("reason", "Destination path build failed")

error_files = extraction_errors + routing_errors + destination_errors
not_processed_files = skipped_files + error_files


def group_examples_by_extension(items):
    groups = {}
    for item in items:
        extension = str(item.get("extension") or Path(item.get("file_name", "")).suffix or "no extension").lower()
        reason = str(item.get("reason") or item.get("error") or item.get("match_source") or "processed")
        stage = str(item.get("stage") or "processing")
        key = f"{stage}|{extension}|{reason}"
        if key not in groups:
            groups[key] = {
                "stage": stage,
                "extension": extension,
                "count": 0,
                "example": item.get("file_name"),
                "reason": reason,
                "error": item.get("error"),
                "bank": item.get("bank"),
                "matched_reference_id": item.get("matched_reference_id"),
            }
        groups[key]["count"] += 1
    return list(groups.values())

bank_counts = {}
bank_examples = {}
for item in file_results:
    bank = item.get("bank", "unknown_bank")
    bank_counts[bank] = bank_counts.get(bank, 0) + 1
    if bank not in bank_examples:
        bank_examples[bank] = {
            "file_name": item.get("file_name"),
            "extension": item.get("extension"),
            "matched_reference_id": item.get("matched_reference_id"),
            "company": item.get("company"),
            "branch": item.get("branch"),
            "destination_blob": item.get("destination_blob"),
        }

manifest_file = run_dir / "final_manifest.json"
manifest_payload = {
    "file_results": file_results,
    "skipped_files": skipped_files,
    "extraction_errors": extraction_errors,
    "routing_errors": routing_errors,
    "destination_errors": destination_errors,
    "error_files": error_files,
    "not_processed_files": not_processed_files,
    "unmatched_files": unmatched_files,
    "bank_counts": bank_counts,
    "bank_examples": bank_examples,
}

manifest_file.write_text(json.dumps(manifest_payload, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

if extraction_errors:
    log(f"Files not processed during extraction: {len(extraction_errors)}", level="warning")
    for item in extraction_errors[:3]:
        log(f"Extraction issue: {item.get('file_name')} - {item.get('error')}", level="warning")
if routing_errors:
    log(f"Files failed during routing: {len(routing_errors)}", level="warning")
if destination_errors:
    log(f"Files failed while building destination paths: {len(destination_errors)}", level="warning")

result = {
    "status": "processed_with_issues" if not_processed_files else "processed",
    "manifest_file": str(manifest_file),
    "file_results_file": destination["file_results_file"],
    "bucket_name": destination.get("bucket_name"),
    "sandbox_prefix": destination.get("sandbox_prefix"),
    "dry_run": destination.get("dry_run", True),
    "total_scanned": scan.get("total_scanned", 0),
    "total_candidates": scan.get("total_candidates", 0),
    "total_extracted": extraction.get("total_signals", len(file_results)),
    "total_routed": len(file_results),
    "total_skipped": len(skipped_files),
    "total_extraction_errors": len(extraction_errors),
    "total_routing_errors": len(routing_errors),
    "total_destination_errors": len(destination_errors),
    "total_gcs_errors": len(destination_errors),
    "total_errors": len(error_files),
    "total_not_processed": len(not_processed_files),
    "bank_counts": bank_counts,
    "bank_examples": bank_examples,
    "sample_file_results": group_examples_by_extension(file_results),
    "sample_skipped": group_examples_by_extension(skipped_files),
    "sample_extraction_errors": group_examples_by_extension(extraction_errors),
    "sample_errors": group_examples_by_extension(error_files),
    "sample_not_processed": group_examples_by_extension(not_processed_files),
    "file_result_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(file_results),
    "skipped_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(skipped_files),
    "extraction_error_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(extraction_errors),
    "not_processed_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(not_processed_files),
    "total_unmatched": len(unmatched_files),
    "sample_unmatched": group_examples_by_extension(unmatched_files),
    "unmatched_extension_summary": group_examples_by_extension(unmatched_files),
}

script_library.label: Deliver Files
script_library.script:
import json
import shutil
import time
from pathlib import Path
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed
from google.cloud import storage


globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "shutil": shutil,
    "time": time,
    "Path": Path,
    "ThreadPoolExecutor": ThreadPoolExecutor,
    "as_completed": as_completed,
    "storage": storage,
})

processed = context.get("Process & Match Files", {}).get("result")
if not processed:
    raise ValueError("Missing Process & Match Files result")

validated = context.get("Validate Environment", {}).get("result", {})
paths = validated.get("paths", {})
credentials_file = Path(paths["credentials_file"])

file_results = json.loads(Path(processed["file_results_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

upload_target = "local" if str(config.get("upload_target", "gcs")).lower() == "local" else "gcs"
bucket_name = config.get("bucket_name") or processed.get("bucket_name") or "sm-bronze"
dry_run = bool(config.get("dry_run", processed.get("dry_run", True)))
upload_workers = max(1, min(int(config.get("upload_workers", 8)), 32))
local_output_dir = str(config.get("local_output_dir") or "").strip()
local_overwrite = bool(config.get("local_overwrite", False))

if upload_target == "local" and not local_output_dir:
    raise ValueError("Local output folder is required when Upload Target is Local Drive")

uploaded_files = []
planned_files = []
error_files = []

if upload_target == "gcs" and not dry_run:
    storage_client = storage.Client.from_service_account_json(str(credentials_file))
    bucket = storage_client.bucket(bucket_name)
else:
    bucket = None


def safe_relative_destination(destination, Path_arg=Path):
    parts = []
    for raw_part in str(destination or "").replace("\\", "/").split("/"):
        part = raw_part.strip()
        if not part or part in {".", ".."}:
            continue
        part = part.replace(":", "_")
        parts.append(part)
    if not parts:
        raise ValueError("Missing destination path")
    return Path_arg(*parts)


def resolve_local_output_root(raw_path, Path_arg=Path):
    path = Path_arg(str(raw_path or "")).expanduser()
    if path.is_absolute():
        return path
    first_part = path.parts[0].lower() if path.parts else ""
    if first_part in {"downloads", "documents", "desktop"}:
        return Path_arg.home() / path
    return path.resolve()


def build_delivery_payload(
    item,
    bucket_name_arg=bucket_name,
    upload_target_arg=upload_target,
    local_output_dir_arg=local_output_dir,
    Path_arg=Path,
    safe_relative_destination_fn=safe_relative_destination,
    resolve_local_output_root_fn=resolve_local_output_root,
):
    local_path = item.get("file_path")
    gcs_destination = item.get("gcs_destination")
    content_type = item.get("content_type", "application/octet-stream")

    if not local_path or not gcs_destination:
        return None, {
            "file_path": local_path,
            "gcs_destination": gcs_destination,
            "error": "Missing file_path or gcs_destination",
        }

    payload = {
        "file_path": local_path,
        "gcs_destination": gcs_destination,
        "destination_path": gcs_destination,
        "content_type": content_type,
        "gcs_uri": f"gs://{bucket_name_arg}/{gcs_destination}",
        "cloud_uri": f"gs://{bucket_name_arg}/{gcs_destination}",
    }
    if upload_target_arg == "local":
        local_root = resolve_local_output_root_fn(local_output_dir_arg)
        local_destination = local_root / safe_relative_destination_fn(gcs_destination)
        payload["local_destination"] = str(local_destination)
    return payload, None


def deliver_one(
    payload,
    bucket_arg=bucket,
    upload_target_arg=upload_target,
    local_overwrite_arg=local_overwrite,
    stop_if_requested_fn=stop_if_requested,
    Path_arg=Path,
    shutil_arg=shutil,
):
    stop_if_requested_fn()
    try:
        if upload_target_arg == "local":
            destination = Path_arg(payload["local_destination"])
            if destination.exists() and not local_overwrite_arg:
                return None, {
                    "file_path": payload["file_path"],
                    "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
                    "local_destination": str(destination),
                    "error": "Local destination already exists and overwrite is off",
                }
            destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            shutil_arg.copy2(str(payload["file_path"]), str(destination))
            return {
                "file_path": payload["file_path"],
                "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
                "local_destination": str(destination),
                    "destination_path": payload["gcs_destination"],
            }, None

        blob = bucket_arg.blob(payload["gcs_destination"])
        blob.upload_from_filename(str(payload["file_path"]), content_type=payload["content_type"])
        return {
            "file_path": payload["file_path"],
            "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
            "gcs_uri": payload["gcs_uri"],
            "cloud_uri": payload["gcs_uri"],
            "destination_path": payload["gcs_destination"],
        }, None
    except Exception as exc:
        return None, {
            "file_path": payload["file_path"],
            "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
            "local_destination": payload.get("local_destination"),
            "error": str(exc),
        }


delivery_payloads = []
for item in file_results:
    stop_if_requested()
    payload, error = build_delivery_payload(item)
    if error:
        error_files.append(error)
        continue

    if dry_run:
        planned = {
            "file_path": payload["file_path"],
            "gcs_destination": payload["gcs_destination"],
            "gcs_uri": payload["gcs_uri"],
        }
        if upload_target == "local":
            planned["local_destination"] = payload["local_destination"]
        planned_files.append(planned)
    else:
        delivery_payloads.append(payload)

if delivery_payloads:
    total_deliveries = len(delivery_payloads)
    progress_interval = max(1, min(100, total_deliveries // 10 or 1))
    delivery_started_at = time.monotonic()
    target_label = f"local folder {local_output_dir}" if upload_target == "local" else f"GCS bucket {bucket_name}"
    log(f"Delivering {total_deliveries} files to {target_label} with {upload_workers} workers", level="info")
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=upload_workers) as executor:
        futures = [executor.submit(deliver_one, payload) for payload in delivery_payloads]
        for completed_count, future in enumerate(as_completed(futures), start=1):
            stop_if_requested()
            delivered, error = future.result()
            if delivered:
                uploaded_files.append(delivered)
            if error:
                error_files.append(error)
            if completed_count == total_deliveries or completed_count % progress_interval == 0:
                elapsed = time.monotonic() - delivery_started_at
                rate = completed_count / elapsed if elapsed > 0 else completed_count
                log(
                    f"Delivery progress: {completed_count}/{total_deliveries} done, "
                    f"delivered={len(uploaded_files)}, errors={len(error_files)}, rate={rate:.1f}/sec",
                    level="info",
                )

if dry_run:
    status = "dry_run"
elif error_files and not uploaded_files:
    status = "delivery_failed"
elif error_files:
    status = "completed_with_delivery_errors"
else:
    status = "copied_local" if upload_target == "local" else "uploaded"
log(
    f"Delivery node finished: target={upload_target}, dry_run={dry_run}, planned={len(planned_files)}, delivered={len(uploaded_files)}, errors={len(error_files)}",
    level="info",
)

result = {
    "status": status,
    "upload_target": upload_target,
    "dry_run": dry_run,
    "bucket_name": bucket_name,
    "local_output_dir": str(resolve_local_output_root(local_output_dir)) if upload_target == "local" else local_output_dir,
    "local_overwrite": local_overwrite,
    "upload_workers": upload_workers,
    "input_count": len(file_results),
    "planned_count": len(planned_files),
    "uploaded_count": len(uploaded_files),
    "delivered_count": len(uploaded_files),
    "error_count": len(error_files),
    "sample_planned_files": planned_files[:10],
    "sample_uploaded_files": uploaded_files[:10],
    "sample_delivered_files": uploaded_files[:10],
    "sample_error_files": error_files[:10],
}

script_library.label: Final Summary
script_library.script:
import json
from pathlib import Path

globals().update({
    "json": json,
    "Path": Path,
})

processed = context.get("Process & Match Files", {}).get("result")
delivery = (context.get("Deliver Files", {}) or context.get("Upload to GCS", {})).get("result")

if not processed:
    raise ValueError("Missing Process & Match Files result")
if not delivery:
    raise ValueError("Missing Deliver Files result")

bank_counts = processed.get("bank_counts", {})

bdo_count = bank_counts.get("bdo", 0)
pos_count = bank_counts.get("pos", 0)
unknown_count = bank_counts.get("unknown_bank", 0)

nonbdo_count = 0
for bank_name, count in bank_counts.items():
    if bank_name not in ["bdo", "pos", "unknown_bank"]:
        nonbdo_count += count

issue_count = processed.get("total_not_processed", 0)
extraction_error_count = processed.get("total_extraction_errors", 0)
routing_error_count = processed.get("total_routing_errors", 0)
delivery_error_count = processed.get("total_destination_errors", processed.get("total_gcs_errors", 0))
unknown_file_count = processed.get("total_unmatched", 0)

log("FINAL SUMMARY", level="info")
log(f"Scanned={processed.get('total_scanned', 0)}, Candidates={processed.get('total_candidates', 0)}, Extracted={processed.get('total_extracted', 0)}, Routed={processed.get('total_routed', 0)}", level="info")
log(f"Skipped={processed.get('total_skipped', 0)}, Not processed={issue_count}, Errors={processed.get('total_errors', 0)}", level="info")
log(f"BDO={bdo_count}, NonBDO={nonbdo_count}, POS={pos_count}, Unknown={unknown_count}", level="info")
log(f"Delivery status={delivery.get('status')}, Target={delivery.get('upload_target', 'gcs')}, Dry run={delivery.get('dry_run')}", level="info")

if issue_count:
    log(
        f"Processing issues found: extraction_errors={extraction_error_count}, routing_errors={routing_error_count}, delivery_errors={delivery_error_count}",
        level="warning",
    )
    for item in processed.get("sample_not_processed", [])[:5]:
        log(
            f"Not processed: {item.get('extension')} ({item.get('count')} file(s)) - {item.get('reason')}. Example: {item.get('example')}",
            level="warning",
        )

if unknown_file_count:
    log(f"Files routed to unknown_bank: {unknown_file_count}. Review unmatched examples in Run Logs.", level="warning")

result = {
    "status": "completed_with_issues" if issue_count or delivery.get("error_count", 0) else "completed",
    "dry_run": delivery.get("dry_run", True),
    "delivery_target": delivery.get("upload_target", "gcs"),
    "delivery_status": delivery.get("status"),
    "upload_status": delivery.get("status"),
    "total_scanned": processed.get("total_scanned", 0),
    "total_candidates": processed.get("total_candidates", 0),
    "total_extracted": processed.get("total_extracted", 0),
    "total_routed": processed.get("total_routed", 0),
    "total_skipped": processed.get("total_skipped", 0),
    "total_not_processed": issue_count,
    "processing_error_count": processed.get("total_errors", 0),
    "extraction_error_count": extraction_error_count,
    "routing_error_count": routing_error_count,
    "path_error_count": delivery_error_count,
    "unknown_count": unknown_count,
    "unmatched_count": unknown_file_count,
    "bank_counts": bank_counts,
    "bdo_count": bdo_count,
    "nonbdo_count": nonbdo_count,
    "pos_count": pos_count,
    "planned_delivery_count": delivery.get("planned_count", 0),
    "delivered_count": delivery.get("delivered_count", delivery.get("uploaded_count", 0)),
    "delivery_error_count": delivery.get("error_count", 0),
    "manifest_file": processed.get("manifest_file"),
    "file_results_file": processed.get("file_results_file"),
    "sample_file_results": processed.get("sample_file_results", []),
    "sample_skipped": processed.get("sample_skipped", []),
    "sample_extraction_errors": processed.get("sample_extraction_errors", []),
    "sample_not_processed": processed.get("sample_not_processed", []),
    "sample_errors": processed.get("sample_errors", []),
    "sample_unmatched": processed.get("sample_unmatched", []),
    "sample_delivery_errors": delivery.get("sample_error_files", []),
}
